zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Corbet於1340年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Roger Corbet20歲，母親Beatrice Augusta25歲。他於大約1359年與Beatrice de Leigh在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1424年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年84歲。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Corbet was born in 1340, in Shropshire, England, his father, Roger Corbet, was 20 and his mother, Beatrice Augusta, was 25. He married Beatrice de Leigh about 1359, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1424, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbet(이)가 1340년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Corbet(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Augusta(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국에서 Beatrice de Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice de Leigh около 1359 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1424 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет.
